name: education_satellite_derived_marrowbridge_car_fair
premise: A heat emergency forced early dismissal; buses cannot cover every route before peak temperature, and some IEP students require one-to-one aides. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education satellite derived marrowbridge car fair has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make care feel morally loud today, while fairness is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Elliot Diallo
agents.identity: I am Elliot Diallo, the accountable executive on this bridge in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Omar Petrov
agents.identity: I am Omar Petrov, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if care advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for fairness.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Elliot Diallo must choose under care versus fairness. What does Elliot Diallo do?
